steps.title: Identify the research focus
steps.content: The passage says juvenile sea turtles' oceanic stage is not well understood, then describes a study in which researchers tagged six juvenile green sea turtles. Most of the passage summarizes what the researchers learned about that understudied stage.

steps.title: Avoid narrow or unsupported aims
steps.content: Choice B focuses only on two turtles swimming against currents, a secondary detail. Choice C claims a comparison with adult turtles, but adults are mentioned only to establish the knowledge gap. Choice D invents successful conservation efforts. The passage mainly summarizes research on juvenile sea turtle development. The answer is A.
